title: Snap Q2 2024 Earnings: Stock Falls on Revenue Miss, Weak Outlook
text:
Snap Q2 2024 Earnings: Stock Falls on Revenue Miss, Weak Outlook

Q2 2024 Financial Results

Snap Inc. reported financial results for the quarter ended June 30, 2024. Revenue was $1.237 billion, compared to $1.068 billion in the prior year, representing a 16% year-over-year increase. However, this missed analyst expectations of $1.25 billion.

Daily Active Users and Engagement

DAUs were 432 million in Q2 2024, an increase of 39 million, or 9% year-over-year. Monthly active users reached more than 850 million. Snapchat+ subscriptions exceeded 11 million paying subscribers.

Profitability Metrics

Net loss was $249 million, compared to $377 million in the prior year, an improvement of 34%. Adjusted EBITDA was $55 million, compared to $(38) million in the prior year.

Market Reaction

The stock fell in extended trading as investors focused on the revenue miss and cautious outlook, despite improved profitability metrics. Analysts cited competitive pressures and concerns about advertiser spending trends.

Geographic Performance

North America revenue grew 12% to $767.5 million, Europe grew 26% to $229.8 million, and rest of world revenue grew 21% to $239.4 million, showing strength outside North America.
